Company Description AirWorks is a leading automated field intelligence company that uses AI to streamline infrastructure design and maintenance. The organization serves top engineering and telecommunications firms by rapidly delivering accurate real-world data from the field. AirWorks extracts critical insights from diverse geospatial data sources, including imagery and LiDAR, helping clients work faster and more efficiently. Role Description AirWorks is seeking a highly capable Full Stack Software Engineer to build and maintain scalable, high-quality web applications using NodeJS, React, and TypeScript. This role works closely with a US-based engineering team, along with design and QA, to deliver customer-facing features with a strong emphasis on quality, performance, and maintainability.  Our platform includes spatial data and mapping workflows, so candidates with GIS or geospatial experience are a strong plus.  Full Stack Development: Design, develop, and maintain full stack features using NodeJS, React, and TypeScript Build and consume RESTful APIs with a focus on performance and reliability Implement responsive, accessible UI components with high fidelity to product designs and UX standards Collaborate with Product and Technical Product Managers to clarify requirements and edge cases Backend & API Development Develop scalable backend services using NodeJS Design and maintain data models, business logic, and API contracts Ensure security, performance, and reliability across backend services Write unit and integration tests to validate backend functionality Frontend Development Build modern React applications using TypeScript and best practices (hooks, state management, component architecture) Translate designs into high-quality, high-fidelity user interfaces Optimize frontend performance and ensure cross-browser compatibility Engineering Excellence Write clean, maintainable, and well-tested code across the stack Participate in code reviews and contribute to shared engineering standards Collaborate with QA on test planning, bug fixes, and release readiness Identify and reduce technical debt while improving system reliability Collaboration & Communication Work effectively with a distributed US-based team through clear documentation and async communication Participate in sprint planning, standups, reviews, and retrospectives Communicate progress, blockers, and risks clearly via Jira and team channels Required Qualifications Bachelor's degree (B.E./B.Tech.) in Computer Science or a related field, with 3+ years of professional experience as a Full Stack Software Engineer. Proven experience developing with AI coding tools (e.g., Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, or agentic workflows) and getting real leverage from them without sacrificing code quality Strong experience with NodeJS, React, and TypeScript in production environments Experience building and consuming APIs (REST preferred) Proficiency with modern frontend tooling and build systems Solid understanding of relational (SQL/PostgreSQL) and NoSQL (MongoDB) databases Experience with Git-based workflows and Jira Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English Comfortable working with distributed teams across time zones Preferred / Bonus Qualifications AI / LLM Experience building or integrating AI/LLM features into product, including API integration, prompt design, and reliably handling model outputs Understanding of AI/ML concepts relevant to software engineering: embeddings, vector search, RAG, function calling, and evaluation strategies Familiarity with vector databases (pgvector, Pinecone, Weaviate, or similar) Experience fine-tuning, evaluating, or deploying ML models in production GIS / Geospatial Experience working with spatial data, maps, or geolocation services Familiarity with tools such as PostGIS, ESRI, GeoJSON, Mapbox, Leaflet, or similar Infrastructure & Practices Experience with cloud platforms (AWS preferred) Experience with CI/CD pipelines and automated testing Familiarity with Agile/Scrum methodologies Understanding of performance optimization and security best practices Working Hours & Flexibility This role requires a 3–4 hour daily overlap with US Eastern Time. In practice, this means availability through roughly the late evening IST (e.g., until ~10:00 PM IST / 12:30 PM ET). The candidate should be comfortable with occasional early-morning or late-evening meetings to support cross-team collaboration.  Success Metrics High-quality features delivered on time and aligned with acceptance criteria Low defect rates and minimal rework during QA and UAT Positive feedback from Engineering, Product, Design, and QA teams on collaboration Well-tested, maintainable code across frontend and backend Consistent contribution to sprint goals and team initiatives Show more Show less Seniority level Entry level Employment type Full-time Job function Engineering and Information Technology Industries Data Infrastructure and Analytics Referrals increase your chances of interviewing at AirWorks by 2x See who you know

Join now By clicking Continue to join or sign in, you agree to LinkedIn’s User Agreement , Privacy Policy , and Cookie Policy . Company Overview Docusign brings agreements to life. Over 1.5 million customers and more than a billion people in over 180 countries use Docusign solutions to accelerate the process of doing business and simplify people’s lives. With intelligent agreement management, Docusign unleashes business-critical data that is trapped inside of documents. Until now, these were disconnected from business systems of record, costing businesses time, money, and opportunity. Using Docusign’s Intelligent Agreement Management platform, companies can create, commit, and manage agreements with solutions created by the #1 company in e-signature and contract lifecycle management (CLM). What you'll do We are looking for a Software Engineer with a blend of back and front-end experience to join our Strategic Partner Integration team. In this role you will own the full development lifecycle—designing, building, testing, and deploying product features for Docusign’s enterprise solutions. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to modernize and scale complex, micro-service-based cloud integrations in an agile, fast-paced environment. By challenging the status quo on architecture and processes, you will help build enterprise-grade, highly reliable, and scalable cloud services. Your work will directly contribute to Docusign’s top priority: bringing Intelligent Agreement Management to large enterprise customers. This position is an individual contributor role reporting to the Manager, Software Engineering. Responsibility Design, implement, and maintain high-quality software applications using C#, .NET, ASP.NET, JavaScript, Node.js, and TypeScript, ensuring optimal performance and user experience Create robust architecture and design patterns for scalable applications, ensuring code reusability and maintainability Ensure code health through continuous refactoring and proactive management of technical debt Collaborate with Product and Design to translate requirements into scalable technical designs Write comprehensive automated tests to maintain a high bar for software quality Participate in code reviews and contribute to the team’s technical documentation Identify and resolve technical issues and bugs in a timely manner, ensuring minimal disruption to development workflows Continuously research and evaluate new technologies, frameworks, and tools to enhance development practices and drive innovation Participate in on-call rotation Job Designation Hybrid: Employee divides their time between in-office and remote work. Access to an office location is required. (Frequency: Minimum 2 days per week; may vary by team but will be weekly in-office expectation) Positions at Docusign are assigned a job designation of either In Office, Hybrid or Remote and are specific to the role/job. Preferred job designations are not guaranteed when changing positions within Docusign. Docusign reserves the right to change a position's job designation depending on business needs and as permitted by local law. What you bring Basic 4+ years of professional experience in software development, specializing in C#, .NET, JavaScript, Node.js, and TypeScript Computer Science degree or a related technical field Experience in both frontend and backend development, capable of building and maintaining scalable applications Experience applying Data Structures and Algorithms Experience with various design patterns and architectural principles, enabling the creation of maintainable and reusable code Experience working in Agile environments, contributing to iterative development and continuous improvement processes Experience with micro-service based system architecture, including RESTful API design Experience building large enterprise scale cloud services Experience with Git, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud-native deployment (containers/Kubernetes) Preferred 6+ years of experience in shipping large scale cloud-based products Experience designing and shipping production-grade, end-to-end integration solutions across large-scale, cloud-based enterprise ecosystems for Large Enterprise Customers Experience with .Net/C#/ASP.NET Core Experience with React/JavaScript/TypeScript, Angular, or similar modern JS frameworks accepted Experience in Azure Technology stack like Azure Kubernetes, CosmosDB, Azure EventHub Experience with Modern AI Agentic Coding tools like Claude Code/GitHub Copilot/Cursor Experience working in Globally Distributed team with different time zones including remote teams Excellent written and verbal communication skills Life at Docusign Working here Docusign is committed to building trust and making the world more agreeable for our employees, customers and the communities in which we live and work. You can count on us to listen, be honest, and try our best to do what’s right, every day. At Docusign, everything is equal. We each have a responsibility to ensure every team member has an equal opportunity to succeed, to be heard, to exchange ideas openly, to build lasting relationships, and to do the work of their life. Best of all, you will be able to feel deep pride in the work you do, because your contribution helps us make the world better than we found it. And for that, you’ll be loved by us, our customers, and the world in which we live. Accommodation Docusign is committed to providing reasonable accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities in our job application procedures. If you need such an accommodation, or a religious accommodation, during the application process, please contact us at accommodations@docusign.com. If you experience any issues, concerns, or technical difficulties during the application process please get in touch with our Talent organization at taops@docusign.com for assistance.
